affiliation_en: Department of Applied Chemical Engineering, Chungnam National University
bio_short_ko: Ni-rich 층상 양극 · 단결정 소재 · 차세대 이차전지 연구.
bio_short_en: Ni-rich layered cathodes, single-crystal systems, and next-generation batteries.
bio_ko:
류훈희 교수는 충남대학교 공과대학 응용화학공학과 조교수로, 차세대 에너지 저장 소재 연구실(NESM Lab)을 이끌고 있습니다.

이차전지 양극소재 분야에서 다수의 톱저널(Nat. Energy, Chem. Rev., Mater. Today, Energy Environ. Sci., ACS Energy Letters 등)에 논문을 발표해 왔으며, Ni-rich 층상 양극의 열화 메커니즘 규명과 단결정·농도구배 구조 설계를 통한 성능 혁신에 기여했습니다.

현재 연구실은 (1) 배터리 소재 합성·분석법, (2) 열화 메커니즘 규명, (3) LIB용 고성능 양극소재, (4) 차세대 배터리의 네 축으로 연구를 전개하며, 탄소중립과 지속 가능한 에너지 미래에 기여하고자 합니다.

※ 상세 학력·경력 정보는 업데이트 예정입니다.
bio_en:
Hoon-Hee Ryu is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Applied Chemical Engineering at Chungnam National University, leading the Next-generation Energy Storage Materials Lab (NESM Lab).

He has published extensively in top journals including Nature Energy, Chemical Reviews, Materials Today, Energy & Environmental Science, and ACS Energy Letters — contributing to the mechanistic understanding of Ni-rich layered cathodes and to performance innovations through single-crystal and concentration-gradient architectures.

The NESM Lab pursues four research pillars: (1) materials synthesis and characterization, (2) degradation mechanism analysis, (3) high-performance cathodes for Li-ion batteries, and (4) next-generation batteries — contributing toward carbon neutrality and a sustainable energy future.

※ Detailed education and career history to be updated.

experience.org_en: Chungnam National University · Dept. of Applied Chemical Engineering

selected_publications: Nanorod Cathodes: A Solution for Polycrystalline Cathodes in Next-Generation Lithium Batteries — ACS Energy Letters (2025)
Single-Crystal vs Polycrystalline Cathodes for Lithium-Ion Batteries — Chemical Reviews (2025)
Near-surface reconstruction in Ni-rich layered cathodes for high-performance lithium-ion batteries — Nature Energy (2024)
Nano-rods in Ni-rich layered cathodes for practical batteries — Chemical Society Reviews (2024)
Long-Lasting NCMA Cathodes via Simultaneous Microstructural Refinement — ACS Energy Letters (2023)
Reducing cobalt from lithium-ion batteries for the electric vehicle era — Energy & Environmental Science (2021)
Microstrain Alleviation in High-Energy Ni-Rich NCMA Cathode — ACS Energy Letters (2021)
